items.title: Revenue Operations Control Tower Initiative
items.description: Revenue Operations Control Tower Initiative exists to improve linked customer and business outcomes through a narrower, measurable internal workflow investment set.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve forecast accuracy through a more reliable and better-scoped internal workflow.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual platform value realized through reuse, automation, and stronger operating flow.

productBricks.change: Extended the brick with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended the brick with domain-specific workflow improvements.
